title: Lentil Stir Fry
description: A hearty and flavorful stir fry made with lentils, vegetables, and a hint of French flair. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of oil and swirl to coat the pan.
Add the onion and carrot and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the French beans and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes.
Add the lentils and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Add the French Stir Fry Sauce and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with midnight fries if desired.
